underlying_goal: Fix and verify DLP rule engine semantics for NOT(NEAR) matching and the four scoring modes (Count, Weighted, UniqueCount, UniqueWeight) to match Gen2 baseline behavior, with proper test coverage
friction_detail: Initial NOT(NEAR) fix broke an existing test, and the first UniqueWeight tests duplicated UniqueCount behavior without exercising the distinguishing logic, requiring rework after the user noticed.
brief_summary: User wanted DLP rule engine NOT(NEAR) and scoring-mode semantics fixed to match Gen2 with real test coverage; Claude diagnosed the bugs, implemented Gen2-parity fixes, and corrected weak tests, achieving most goals before being interrupted on a skip-test question.
